name: Rhys Nicholson
bio: Rhys Nicholson is an Australian stand-up comedian and actor known for fast, frank and self-deprecating material. They rose through the festival circuit in the 2010s, released a Netflix special and toured internationally, including opening for Conan O'Brien in Australia. Since 2021 Nicholson has served as a judge on RuPaul's Drag Race Down Under.

timeline.ev: Opens for Conan O'Brien in Australia and on CONAN
Releases Netflix special Live at the Athenaeum
Joins RuPaul's Drag Race Down Under as a judge
Co-founds the Comedy Republic venue in Melbourne
Continues as a Drag Race Down Under judge

accolades: Netflix special Live at the Athenaeum 2020
Judge on RuPaul's Drag Race Down Under
Opened for Conan O'Brien's 2019 Australian tour

bits.yt_title: Rhys Nicholson Has An Intolerance To Hope | CONAN on TBS
